computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.details: LBPs do not support single-token liquidity operations.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).details: Uses current interpolated weights based on time progress. For seedless LBPs, adds virtual balance to reserve token.

params.balancesLiveScaled18: Token balances after applying decimal scaling and rates.
params.rounding: Rounding direction for the invariant calculation.

returns.invariant: The calculated invariant, scaled to 18 decimals.

getNormalizedWeights().details: Weights are interpolated between start and end weights based on how much time has elapsed since the sale start.

returns.weights: Array of current normalized weights (sum to 1e18).

returns._0: True if project token can only be bought, not sold back.
True if within the sale period (startTime <= now <= endTime).

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.details: Enforces:   - Swaps only during sale period   - Optional blocking of project token swaps in   - Virtual balance adjustment for seedless LBPs

params.params: Swap parameters, including balancesScaled18 adjusted by rates.

returns.amountCalculatedScaled18: Calculated amount for the swap in scaled 18-decimal format.

computeBalance(uint256[],uint256,uint256.notice: Computes the new balance of a token after an operation.

computeInvariant(uint256[],uint8).notice: Computes and returns the pool's invariant using weighted math.

facetFuncs().notice: Returns the function selectors exposed by this facet.

facetInterfaces().notice: Returns the interfaces implemented by this facet.

facetMetadata().notice: Returns comprehensive metadata about this facet.

facetName().notice: Returns the name of this facet.

getGradualWeightUpdateParams().notice: Returns the gradual weight update parameters.

getNormalizedWeights().notice: Returns the current normalized weights based on time progress.

isProjectTokenSwapInBlocked().notice: Returns whether project token swaps in are blocked.

isSwapEnabled().notice: Returns whether swaps are currently enabled.

onSwap((uint8,uint256,uint256[],uint256,.notice: Execute a swap in the pool using weighted math with current weights.
